title: Su Metal Babymetal vocalist covering Tamashii no Refrain

[]: Su-Metal (Babymetal vocalist) covering Tamashii no Refrain             Quote Post by ungenesis » Wed Apr 01, 2015 3:35 pm Forgive me if this has been posted before. []:             Quote Post by Evangelion » Thu Apr 02, 2015 1:13 am This is awesome. My brother is a pretty big fan of both Baby Metal and Evangelion and I can't wait to show this to him. Thanks for sharing!

[]:             Quote Post by robersora » Thu Apr 02, 2015 5:12 am Ha, I love it!
